framework_step: Design · Step 2 of 9: Establish the Unified Data Asset Inventory & Entity-Relationship Model
storage_environment: Local App Runtime Environment (mishugarg-macbookpro4 / PostgreSQL Instance)

session_telemetry_log.description: Parent Table. Authoritative internal tracking store mapping real-time telecom network ingress states and session lifecycles.

session_id.description: Primary Key (PK). Unique tracking identifier generated instantly at the Step 1 network entry gateway.

source_phone_number.description: Ingested telecom ANI phone identifier used to route and group carrier traffic.

ingress_channel.description: The inbound channel pathway chosen by the citizen.

session_active.description: True if the user session is actively processing or waiting for carrier signaling inputs.

session_status.description: State machine identifier mapping the exact termination path of the communication channel.

created_at.description: Timestamp when the incoming SIP INVITE or messenger webhook first registered.

completed_at.description: Timestamp when the communication session permanently terminated, enabling precise latency auditing.

session_extraction_details.description: Child Table. Granular tracking store mapping sequential network payload packets, user correction attempts, and conversational AI extraction metrics.

payload_id.description: Primary Key (PK). Unique message token tracking the specific network text packet or raw audio transmission stream chunk received.

session_id.description: Foreign Key (FK). Explicit relational link anchoring this transaction record directly back to its parent session_telemetry_log.session_id.

attempt_id.description: Sequential loop counter tracking the user's conversational transaction submissions within this specific session loop.

raw_unstructured_text.description: Ingested text string captured from BHASHINI ASR or the native WhatsApp Webhook payload text.

standardized_english_text.description: Normalized administrative translation generated downstream by the BHASHINI NMT layer.

extraction_confidence.description: Mathematical log-likelihood model score evaluating structured parsing precision.

farmer_id_cleartext.description: Masked Identity String. Meticulously stripped from storage structures post-tokenization hash processing at the Step 5 verification perimeter.

extracted_district.description: Extracted regional district administrative geographical zone boundary entity.

extracted_crop_type.description: Normalized agricultural crop matching foundational core data registry categories.

extracted_reported_anomaly.description: Extracted damage classification or target biological pest vector reported by the citizen.

processing_state.description: Operational tracking flag indicating whether this specific record pass has been overridden by a subsequent user correction or successfully committed down the pipeline.
